response.objective_caption: A close-up outdoor portrait of an older woman with tousled hair and metal-rimmed eyeglasses, looking directly at the camera with a neutral expression. She wears a dark collared coat, and out-of-focus trees and fencing are visible behind her.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A close-up outdoor portrait of an older woman with tousled hair and metal-rimmed eyeglasses, looking directly at the camera with a neutral expression. She wears a dark collared coat, and out-of-focus trees and fencing are visible behind her. The photograph is rendered in a muted, desaturated sepia palette with low vibrancy and a retro faded monotone tint.
